title: Share a Google Doc as View Only
description: Send a Google Doc link that anyone can view without logging in.

steps.title: Open the Share dialog
steps.text: In Google Docs, click the Share button in the top-right corner.

steps.title: Change access to Anyone with the link
steps.text: Click the access dropdown and select Anyone with the link. Set the role to Viewer.

steps.title: Copy the link
steps.text: Click Copy link, then paste it where you need to share it.
